parity.notes: Dictionary<string,int> domain kept (no simplification needed): Calor supports it natively via §HAS/§PUT/§IDX/§EACHKV and instance Remove; the compiler requires declaring the 'mut' effect on the mutating functions (per the bcl-system Dictionary manifest), which the fixture demonstrates on AddItem. Reference solutions are structurally identical: AddItem (if/else, 2), RemoveItem (guard + if/else, 3), TotalCount (loop, 2), +1 base each. NOT yet difficulty-validated (gates doc §3.1).
